name: tapagents
description: TapAgents marketplace — opinionated AI product team for Claude Code. One curated plugin, not a sprawl of forty.

plugins.name: tapagents
plugins.description: The full TapAgents framework — 18 agents, 20 commands, 32 protocols, stack-aware templates, seventeen instrumented enforcement + telemetry hooks (every hook fire / block / classification / misfire lands in events.jsonl; M0 adds redacted permission-denial / harness-block telemetry; v0.15.0 adds auto-registration of cross-cutting sessions; v0.21.0 adds the sync-discipline gate that enforces framework adoptions through the dedicated `sync-tapagents` branch; v0.22.0 shifts HQ topology to filesystem-only sync (no git tree at the source root) and adds the manifest `lint_exemptions` block + `--source-mode` flag for sync.ts; v0.25.0 adds the state-machine phase-transition Stop hook that emits live `state-machine`/`transition`/`<from>-<to>` telemetry per project phase change; v0.26.0 adds the `session-work-output` stream that captures product files touched + committed lines-of-code at session seal; v0.29.0 adds the `tapagents` CLI bin — a one-time `tapagents login` device-flow that connects a machine to Tap Agents Live with zero further commands; v0.30.0 makes the HQ→mirror publish pipeline private-data-safe — a mechanical genericizer, a `framework-private-data-gate` PreToolUse hook, a `bare-codename` sync lint, and a `verify-genericize` no-re-leak gate that now also scans mirror-native shipped trees like the CLI), and an internal→public sync flow keeping the framework's two trees in lockstep. Installs a complete AI product team in your repo.
